# Bibek Sunar

Official website: https://www.bibeksunar.com.np/
Official about page: https://www.bibeksunar.com.np/about-bibek-sunar
Official portrait: https://www.bibeksunar.com.np/bibek-sunar-portrait.jpg

Bibek Sunar is a marketing professional from Bharatpur-6, Nepal.
He completed a Bachelor of Business Administration (Marketing) from Balkumari Campus in 2024.
His interests include marketing, sales, digital marketing, business development, and entrepreneurship.

Official social profiles:
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/bibek.contact1
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bibek.contact1

Preferred entity name:
- Bibek Sunar

Alternate search terms:
- Bibek
- bibeksunar
- Bibek Sunar Nepal
